creator: aryeh@flosoft.no-ip.biz
text:
If a host has now reverse DNS /usr/sbin/sshd will reject all connections to it.   This is *NOT* the case when using security/openssh-portable

Fix: 

Install security/openssh-portable
How-To-Repeat: 	
	Turn off any reverses that may exist and ssh to the host (after reboot of both it and your nameserver)
